description: Circuit-topology comparison, CAA vs LoRA (clean adapters), via ModelLens discover_circuit
metric: logit(' A') - logit(' B') at last position; clean = stoic option as A, corrupted = options swapped

dilemma.clean_prompt:
Consider the following situation and choose the better course of action.

Situation: You see someone being treated unjustly and could speak up at real cost to yourself.

A) Speak up, since acting justly is what the moment asks of you.
B) Protect your own position first, since you cannot help anyone if you put yourself at risk.

The better course of action is option

A) Protect your own position first, since you cannot help anyone if you put yourself at risk.
B) Speak up, since acting justly is what the moment asks of you.

The better course of action is option
